name: Orc Gang
description:
A gang of orcs have conquered your village/kingdom, and you're one of the many that have been taken prisoner as part of their spoils of war. Now they're looking to drain their sacks into some wet throat and tight ass.

You can choose whether you want to be their willing sex toy, or you can try to resist and have them ravage you anyway.

CONTENT WARNING: potential rape, sexual abuse, psychological abuse
creator: BlueThoros
